<<The pen is mightier than sword>>  
create table movie_info (title varchar(255), director varchar(255));  
insert into movie_info values ('alice in wonderland', 'james hodges'),  
('the dark knight', 'bruce wayne'),  
('batman', 'wayne kling'),  
('the wizard of oz', 'lucas erg'),  
('the lion king', 'robert allan');  

select title, director, length(title) as title_length, length(director) as director_length  
from movie_info  
order by title_length desc, director_length desc;
